% Antarctica 2K 2017 isotope anomalies (relative to 1960-1990 reference interval)
% weighting method : unweighted, with grid reduction
% smoothing : 5-year binned averages
% columns after each regional mean composite give details of n (number of records) as well as 5%, 25%, 75% and 95% levels of composites
% col 1 : time, in year AD
% col 2 : East Antarctic Plateau (mean; per mil, d18O equivalent)
% col 9 : Wilkes Land Coast (mean; per mil, d18O equivalent)
% col 16 : Weddell Sea Coast (mean; per mil, d18O equivalent)
% col 23 : Antarctic Peninsula (mean; per mil, d18O equivalent)
% col 30 : West Antarctic Ice Sheet (mean; per mil, d18O equivalent)
% col 37 : Victoria Land Coast (mean; per mil, d18O equivalent)
% col 44 : Dronning Maud Land Coast (mean; per mil, d18O equivalent)
